title: About Me
text:
About Me

Alaina Lawrence is the Business Consultant at WomenVenture and a student in the Ecosystem Science & Sustainability Professional Science Master’s program at Colorado State University. Alaina has 10 years of experience in Midwestern food systems, 6 years of experience in non-profit administration, and 4 years of sustainability expertise
